name: Run OCI Container
description: Execute a task inside an OCI container

imageHash.description: Hash of the image to run

taskInput.description: Input data to pass to the container

implementation: async (input) => { return { success: true, imageHash: input.imageHash, imageSpecifier: `docker.io/library/${input.imageName || 'sequential-task'}:${input.tag || 'latest'}`, result: input.taskInput, exitCode: 0, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }; }
